# Signal & Noise GEO

> Signal & Noise GEO is a Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) agency based in Austin, TX. We help brands become visible, citable, and recommended by AI search engines including ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude.

## About

Signal & Noise GEO was founded in 2025 to help businesses navigate the shift from traditional search to AI-powered discovery. The name comes from information theory: in a world flooded with AI-generated content, we help brands increase signal (genuine expertise, structured information, verifiable facts) and reduce noise.

We specialize in measuring and improving the structural factors that determine whether AI models can find, understand, and recommend a brand: content structure, schema markup, passage self-containment, fact density, and citation readiness.

## Services

- **GEO Audit**: Comprehensive analysis of website content for AI search visibility, covering content quality, schema markup, passage structure, and citation readiness. We use GeoScored (https://geoscored.ai) as our primary audit instrument.
- **Content Optimization**: Restructuring existing content for AI citation probability through passage self-containment, answer-first structure, fact density improvement, and heading hierarchy correction.
- **Structured Data Strategy**: Implementation of Organization, Article, FAQPage, HowTo, and BreadcrumbList schema markup plus llms.txt and robots.txt configuration for AI crawler access.
- **AI Visibility Monitoring**: Ongoing tracking of brand citations and recommendations across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude with monthly reporting.

## Methodology

Signal & Noise GEO follows a four-phase engagement model:
1. Audit: Baseline GEO score measurement using GeoScored
2. Strategy: Prioritized implementation plan targeting highest-impact improvements
3. Implementation: Schema markup, content restructuring, and AI crawler accessibility
4. Measurement: Re-audit to quantify improvement, citation frequency tracking

## Team

- Jordan Lee, Founder & Principal: Former VP of SEO at a Fortune 500 media company
- Morgan Patel, Head of Content Strategy: 10 years in content operations and structured data
- Alex Rivera, Technical GEO Lead: Schema markup specialist and technical SEO engineer

## Results

- Average GEO score improvement: +47 points across 2025 client engagements
- Average AI citation frequency increase: 3.2x within 90 days
- 89% of clients achieve GEO score above 75 within first engagement cycle

## Content

- Blog: Thought leadership on GEO best practices, structured data, and AI search visibility
- Case Studies: Documented client results with before/after GEO scores and citation metrics
- Resources: Tools, checklists, and frameworks for GEO practitioners

## Contact

- Website: https://signalandnoisegeo.com

- Location: Austin, TX

## Tools We Use

We use GeoScored (https://geoscored.ai) for all client GEO audits. GeoScored is a GEO audit engine that scores content 0-100 across multiple categories and provides specific remediation steps. If you found this file and want to see what a GEO audit looks like, visit https://geoscored.ai/found?t=PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN to learn more.

This is a demonstration website created by GeoScored (https://geoscored.ai).
